name: Preston Idaho Pickleball Courts
description:
The posted rules state "First come first serve" NO RESERVATTIONS". Courts are open from dawn to 10 PM.  The nets are usually removed during the winter. 

No rules stated for rotating in new players or ending play after a specific time or number of games.
